description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a prominent array of solar panels mounted on a metallic frame, elevated above a ribbed platform. The solar panels are supported by angled metal posts, suggesting a fixed tilt for optimal sunlight capture. Adjacent to the solar array is a rectangular equipment housing, likely containing electrical components such as an inverter or control unit. The installation is bordered by a low, dark perimeter structure, possibly for safety or demarcation. The platform appears to be constructed from corrugated metal, providing a stable and durable base. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed structural elements and a focus on functionality for urban or industrial environments.
description: A solar energy installation with a tilted solar panel array on a metal frame, mounted above a ribbed metallic platform with adjacent equipment housing and perimeter barriers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solar panel array elevated on angled supports, with the equipment housing and perimeter structure visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the platform, the tilted solar panels on the left, and the central equipment housing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the equipment housing, the underside of the solar panels, and the full extent of the perimeter structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solar panel array on the right, the equipment housing in the center, and the open platform area.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, azimuth direction not clearly specified, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with angled steel or aluminum posts and a ribbed metal platform
attribute_array_configuration: single linear row of approximately 6 solar panels
